rows: Join or shade the synthetic bid/offer for 40% of planned size at the first qualified band touch.
Place the second 30% only if the spread extends another 0.35 ATR and the macro read has not deteriorated.
Final 30% enters after the spread stops making new extremes and reclaims a small threshold, such as 0.10-0.20 ATR.
When timing precision matters more than catching the exact low/high.
If first clip fills and immediately loses 0.35 ATR without stabilization, scratch instead of adding.
Fast markets, news shocks, weak confirmation.
Scale out at mean, +0.5 ATR, then trail the remainder.
